codeReview.summary: The fix successfully addresses unchecked DB errors in reports.go. All four DB functions (SetUserReportSettings, SetChatReportStatus, BlockReportUser, UnblockReportUser) have been modified to return errors instead of silently logging them. The reports() handler now properly checks these errors and notifies users with the 'common_settings_save_failed' translation key on failure. Tests were updated to handle the new error return values.

summary: Fix for unchecked DB errors in reports module has been successfully implemented. All DB calls now check errors and notify users on failure. No silent failures remain. Tests updated and passing.
